cleavage agent: Trypsin was set as the specific protease
collision energy: The normalized collision energy (NCE) was set to 28%
enrichment method: For phosphopeptide enrichment, TiO2 beads were prepared
fragmentation method: each full scan followed by 20 MS2 scans (HCD)
instrument: analyzed online with a Q Exactive mass spectrometer
labeling: label-free quantification (LFQ) based on MS1 intensity measurements
